commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-wiki summary parsing to record bad frontmatter on page summaries and report it as an `invalid-frontmatter` lint issue instead of aborting vault-wide scans.

PR surface: Source +40, Tests +67. Total +107 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows malformed frontmatter reaches `YAML.parse`, `readPageSummaries` stops and rethrows, and both `wiki_apply` and `wiki_lint` call vault compilation; I did not run a live repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor real behavior proof is the remaining merge gate; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue from this review.
